---
title : "Insert Title Here"
author: "Morde Bernstein, Marley McGehee, Kimberly McNeil"
date: "5/01/2026"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, 
                      error = TRUE, 
                      message = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)

```


## Introduction

Our first dataset is focused on adult asthma prevalence by state in 2020. We obtained this dataset from the CDC website at the [2020 Archived State or Territory Asthma Data](https://www.cdc.gov/asthma/archivedata/2020/2020_archived_states_territory.html) page.


Our second dataset is focused on air pollution. We obtained this dataset from the

## Data Import

## Exploratory Data Analysis

## Research

## Conclusion
